Maple Ridge residents
 Live help today 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Back to chat
What is your question about?

Pick a topic and we'll connect you with the right department.

Search topics
 Don't worry about spelling — we'll figure out what you mean.
Streets & Potholes

Report a pothole, broken sidewalk, sinkhole, or a streetlight that's out.

Live help — usually replies in 4 minutes
Trash & Recycling

Missed pickups, bulky item drop‑off, bin replacements, and yard waste days.

Live help — usually replies in 6 minutes
Permits & Licenses

Building permits, fence and shed approvals, dog licenses, and block parties.

Live help — usually replies in 10 minutes
Parks & Trees

Overgrown branches, park maintenance, playground repairs, and tree planting requests.

Live help — usually replies in 8 minutes
Council & Meetings

When meetings happen, how to speak at one, and how to find past minutes.

Live help — usually replies in 12 minutes
Water & Utilities

Bill questions, water shut‑offs, low pressure, and signing up for service.

Busy — usually replies in 20 minutes
Housing & Property

Property taxes, rental issues, abandoned buildings, and code complaints.

Live help — usually replies in 9 minutes
Safety & Code

Non‑emergency safety concerns, noise complaints, and parking violations.

Live help — usually replies in 7 minutes
Voting & Records

Where to vote, getting a copy of a birth certificate, and other public records.

Closed today — opens Monday 8:00 AM
Not sure?

Tell us in your own words and we'll route your question. You don't need to know the department name — just describe what's going on.

Just describe my problem
Maple Ridge City Hall
RESIDENT CHAT SERVICE

A friendly way to ask City Hall a question. Open to every resident, no account needed. We answer in plain language.

For emergencies dial 911

Start a chat

Report an issue
